text: Welcome aboard, newbie_kim! You’ve been approved as a community member. Start by introducing yourself in #introductions.
Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You’ve been approved as a moderator. Please review the community guidelines and mod handbook in #resources.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You’ve been approved as an event helper. Check out the #events channel for upcoming activities and volunteer info.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! You’ve been approved as a mentor. Please review the mentoring guidelines in #mentor-resources and say hi in #mentors.
